reviews.name: Christopher Gutierrez Garcia
reviews.text:
The BEST:

- Price
- Customer Service
- Experience

Proshield Epoxy did an awesome job! Julian, Gale and  Winnie were excellent.

I researched alot of companies in Vegas and they provided me with the BEST price for the polyurea blizzard  coating for our garage.

Other companies charged $2500 or more for a lifetime warranty.

STOP looking anywhere else and hire this company!

reviews.name: Dio Rodriguez
reviews.text:
Our new garage floor looks fantastic. I would recommend them if you are looking at doing your epoxy floor in Las Vegas. High class company with extremely knowledgeable employees.

Gael did a fantastic job educating us on the entire process and their polyaspastic products

Sebastian and Bobby installed the floor and were extremely knowledgeable and professional

reviews.name: Chris Zamora
reviews.text: Proshield Epoxy did a great job my garage looks amazing. Julian was great on communication and worked with me on my time line of when I needed it completed very professional will definitely recommend there services. Thank you

reviews.name: ALEXANDRA RUIZ GALILEA
reviews.text: Proshield Epoxy was the best choice for my interior remodeling. They were punctual and very professional. When they got to my property, they explained the process from start to end and how long it would take. I am beyond happy with the results of my metallic floor. I get so many compliments when guest come over about the attention to detail and design. I would highly recommend Proshield Epoxy to anyone looking to upgrade their home in Las Vegas.

reviews.name: Hiram Andino
reviews.text:
I just had my floors done by Proshield, and I'd be doing everyone a disservice if I didn’t tell you all about it. Julian, who led the project, was amazing!! Every day, he gave me a break down of what they did and what was up for the next day. This wasn't just chit-chat; it was super important for making sure everything went smoothly and everyone was on the same page. It made the whole process extremely transparent and stress-free for me.

Gale and Sebastian? Total stars! They put in so much effort, working non-stop. Watching them was like seeing a well-oiled machine in action. Everyone knew exactly what to do, and they did it perfectly.

The design and quality of my new epoxy floor are incredible! It's so much more than I expected. They even managed to get rid of this stubborn carpet that was glued down like crazy. I thought it was going to be a nightmare, but they handled it like pros.

So, a huge thanks to Julian, Gale, Sebastian, and everyone at Proshield. You guys didn't just give me a new floor; you gave me a piece of art. Super impressed and would absolutely recommend anyone looking to give their space a face lift.
